# Issue Title

Add a mobile-first UI board skill

## Description

Add a new Codex UI board skill focused on mobile-first product interfaces. The skill should include standalone previews, design tokens, Tailwind preset, screenshots, and an installable `codex-skill` bundle.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New skill follows the repository folder conventions.
- [ ] Preview demonstrates mobile-first layouts and responsive behavior.
- [ ] Light and dark themes are included, if appropriate.
- [ ] Documentation includes install instructions and Codex prompt examples.
- [ ] Screenshots are added for the preview.

## Suggested Labels

`new-skill`, `enhancement`, `mobile`
